user.title: Gate Access
user.description: Choose the openings to control (gate, wicket…), a log file and optional auto-close time.

targets.title: Openings and log
targets.description: Pick the openings (gate, wicket…), the log file and auto-close time.

sharing.title: Panel sharing
sharing.description: Turn off to make the panel visible to all HA users (e.g. household members), not only administrators.

logging.title: Records and statistics
logging.description: Count opens per opening (daily/monthly/yearly) and record gate closings.

data.delete_password: Password to clear history (empty = no password)
data.rate_limit: Open limit per link (per minute, 0 = no limit)

autoclose.title: Auto-close
autoclose.description: Set auto-close time per opening (0 = no auto-close). Also applies to remote/automatic opens. Enable a close button on the open page.

data.show_close: Show a close button on the open page
